info.name: FIT4110 Lab04 Camera Docker Verification
info.description: Postman collection used to verify the Dockerized camera service in Lab 04.

exec: pm.test('Response has status ok', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.status).to.eql('ok'); });
pm.test('Response has service name and version', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('service'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('version'); });

pm.test('Response includes service and status', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('service'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('status'); pm.expect(json.status).to.eql('running'); });
